items.title: Man sentenced to 1 year in jail in death of Jewish man during dueling protests
items.desc: A protester who pleaded guilty to manslaughter in the death of an elderly Jewish man during a 2023 demonstration in California over the war in Gaza was sentenced this week to one year in county jail, prosecutors said.

items.title: Siderophore production by the lichen fungus Xanthoria parietina supports its algal symbiont
items.desc: The mechanisms underlying the adaptation of lichens to nutrient-poor environments are poorly understood. Here, Happacher et al. show that a globally distributed lichen fungus produces an iron-scavenging molecule that promotes growth of its algal partner.
